final:
module dram_cell (  
    input wire [7:0] data_in,  
    input wire [2:0] addr,  
    input wire RE,  
    input wire WE,  
    output reg [7:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [7:0] unused_memory [0:7]; // 8-bit DRAM cell with 8 addresses  

    always @(posedge WE) begin  
        unused_memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write data to unused_memory  
    end  

    always @(posedge RE) begin  
        data_out <= unused_memory[addr]; // Read data from unused_memory  
    end  
endmodule
